businesses.name: Tomoca Bole Atlas
businesses.shortDescription: Classic Addis coffee energy with a fast-moving neighborhood crowd.
businesses.longDescription: A reliable stop for macchiatos, roasted beans, and that familiar standing-counter rhythm that locals move through every day.

businesses.name: Yod Abyssinia
businesses.shortDescription: Dinner, performance, and a polished big-night-out atmosphere.
businesses.longDescription: Known for Ethiopian dining paired with dance and music programming, with a menu that works for groups and visitors.

businesses.name: Sishu Mexico
businesses.shortDescription: Stylish all-day dining with a menu broad enough for mixed groups.
businesses.longDescription: A contemporary restaurant-cafe hybrid that is popular for lunch meetings, relaxed dinners, and dependable coffee service.

businesses.name: Fendika Cultural Center
businesses.shortDescription: One of the city's most memorable places for art, music, and movement.
businesses.longDescription: An iconic cultural venue with live performances and a strong sense of local creative identity.

businesses.name: Bilo's Piassa
businesses.shortDescription: A dependable pastry and coffee stop that locals recommend often.
businesses.longDescription: A bakery-led neighborhood favorite for quick meetings, takeaway pastries, and an easy everyday routine.

reviews.title: The pace feels very Addis
reviews.body: Fast service, great macchiato, and the kind of place that still feels anchored in the city.

reviews.title: Reliable stop before meetings
reviews.body: Easy coffee run with the usual crowd. Beans were fresh and the service moved quickly.

reviews.title: Best for hosting visitors
reviews.body: The performance element makes it memorable, and the whole experience feels polished.

reviews.title: Big energy, a little loud
reviews.body: Great for a celebratory dinner. Expect a lively room and plan ahead for peak time.

reviews.title: Solid lunch meeting choice
reviews.body: The menu works for mixed preferences and the setting feels current without trying too hard.

reviews.title: Good, but timing slipped
reviews.body: Nice room and friendly team, though service slowed down during the lunch rush.

reviews.title: A real city highlight
reviews.body: If you want something specific to Addis rather than generic nightlife, this is the kind of place to start.

reviews.title: Pastries worth repeating
reviews.body: Simple, easy, and consistently good for a quick catch-up or coffee break.

reviews.title: Morning favorite
reviews.body: Friendly staff and the kind of bakery that gets recommended by locals for a reason.

reviews.title: Should not count yet
reviews.body: This review is pending and intentionally excluded from the public score.

reviews.title: Removed review
reviews.body: This review exists to prove removed content does not affect ratings.
